# EAAccessoryKey

**Global Variable**

A key that indicates the accessory object whose status changed.

## Declaration

```swift
let EAAccessoryKey: String
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.externalaccessory/documentation/ExternalAccessory/EAAccessoryDidConnectNotification] and [doc://com.apple.externalaccessory/documentation/ExternalAccessory/EAAccessoryDidDisconnectNotification] notifications contain this key in their userInfo dictionary. The value is an [doc://com.apple.externalaccessory/documentation/ExternalAccessory/EAAccessory] object.

## Managing Connection Status Changes

- **registerForLocalNotifications()**: Begins the delivery of accessory-related notifications to the current application.
- **unregisterForLocalNotifications()**: Stops the delivery of accessory-related notifications to the current application.
- **EAAccessoryDidConnect**: A notification that the system sends when an accessory becomes connected and available for your application to use.
- **EAAccessoryDidDisconnect**: A notification that is posted when an accessory is disconnected and no longer available for your application to use.
- **EAAccessorySelectedKey**: A key that indicates the accessory object that the user selected.
